sentiment: Underneath every tool we trust, something is quietly remaking itself — and we call that progress.

stories.title: Bun is being ported from Zig to Rust
stories.summary: A runtime shedding one skin for another — what we call progress is often just a different kind of careful.

stories.title: Agent Skills
stories.summary: We build tools to extend ourselves, then forget where we end and they begin.

stories.title: The Car That Watches You Back
stories.summary: Every surface we trusted has quietly learned to look back — comfort and surveillance share the same wire.
